scenarios.title: Dataset Processing, Evaluation, and Hub Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Dataset loading, schemas, streaming, format conversion, metric/evaluator modules, benchmark task selection, result caches, data validation, and Hub or CLI workflows.
scenarios.role: Use Hugging Face Evaluate to load metrics, comparisons, and measurements; compute and combine results; run evaluator pipelines; create custom modules; troubleshoot optional dependencies, cache, Hub, and CLI workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `evaluate` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: evaluator pipelines, hub and cli, module computation, and module loading.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `evaluate` when the request names `evaluate`, centers on Use Hugging Face Evaluate to load metrics, comparisons, and measurements; compute and combine results; run evaluator pipelines; create custom modules; troubleshoot optional dependencies, cache, Hub, and CLI workflows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in dataset processing evaluation and hub workflows. Then route to evaluator pipelines, hub and CLI, module computation, or module loading when those focused workflows match.
